title: Toyota Electric Status
description: Electric vehicle battery and charging status for Toyota/Lexus hybrid and EV models

fuelLevel.description: Fuel tank percentage for hybrid models (0-100)

fuelRange.description: Estimated fuel-based range in miles for hybrid models

totalRange.description: Combined electric + fuel total range in miles for hybrids

pluggedIn.description: Whether the vehicle is currently plugged in

estimatedChargeCompleteTime.description: Estimated time when charging will be complete

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last status update
